rationale: This candidate provides the most natural and technically accurate translation. It correctly translates 'shell access' as 'acceso a la terminal' (or shell) consistently, and maintains the direct, instructional tone of the original. It preserves all MDX structures and heading levels perfectly. Other candidates had minor issues with consistency or used slightly more robotic phrasing in the technical sections.
